question: 查询所有歌手的姓名和年龄
generated_sql: SELECT "Name", "Age" FROM "singer"

question: 列出所有宠物的名字和类型
generated_sql: SELECT "PetID", "PetType" FROM "Pets"

question: 查询所有洲的名称，去重
generated_sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Continent" FROM "country"

question: 列出所有汽车制造商的名称和所属国家
generated_sql: SELECT "car_makers"."FullName" AS "制造商名称", "countries"."CountryName" AS "所属国家" FROM "car_makers" JOIN "countries" ON "car_makers"."Country" = "countries"."CountryId"

question: 查询编号为1的航空公司的所有航班号
generated_sql: SELECT "flights"."FlightNo" FROM "flights" JOIN "airlines" ON "flights"."Airline" = "airlines"."uid" WHERE "airlines"."uid" = 1

question: 查询所有员工的姓名和职位
generated_sql:
SELECT "employee"."Name" AS "姓名", "hiring"."Is_full_time" AS "是否全职"
FROM "employee"
JOIN "hiring" ON "employee"."Employee_ID" = "hiring"."Employee_ID"

question: 列出所有交响乐团的名称和成立年份
generated_sql: SELECT "Orchestra", "Year_of_Founded" FROM "orchestra"

question: 查询所有学生的名字和姓氏
generated_sql: SELECT "first_name", "last_name" FROM "Students"

question: 统计每场演唱会有多少位歌手参加，按参加人数降序排列
generated_sql:
SELECT "c"."concert_Name", COUNT("sic"."Singer_ID") AS "singer_count"
FROM "concert" "c"
JOIN "singer_in_concert" "sic" ON "c"."concert_ID" = "sic"."concert_ID"
GROUP BY "c"."concert_ID", "c"."concert_Name"
ORDER BY "singer_count" DESC

question: 查询每位教师教授的课程名称
generated_sql:
SELECT "teacher"."Name" AS "教师姓名", "course"."Course" AS "课程名称"
FROM "teacher"
JOIN "course_arrange" ON "teacher"."Teacher_ID" = "course_arrange"."Teacher_ID"
JOIN "course" ON "course_arrange"."Course_ID" = "course"."Course_ID"
ORDER BY "teacher"."Name"

question: 统计每个国家有多少个汽车制造商，按数量从多到少排序
generated_sql:
SELECT c."CountryName", COUNT(m."Id") AS "MakerCount"
FROM "car_makers" m
JOIN "countries" c ON m."Country" = c."CountryId"
GROUP BY c."CountryName"
ORDER BY "MakerCount" DESC

question: 查询每条航线的航空公司名称、出发机场城市和目的机场城市
generated_sql: SELECT "airlines"."Airline" AS "航空公司名称", "src"."City" AS "出发机场城市", "dest"."City" AS "目的机场城市" FROM "flights" JOIN "airlines" ON "flights"."Airline" = "airlines"."uid" JOIN "airports" AS "src" ON "flights"."SourceAirport" = "src"."AirportCode" JOIN "airports" AS "dest" ON "flights"."DestAirport" = "dest"."AirportCode"

question: 找出每位指挥家指挥过的演出数量，按数量降序排列
generated_sql:
SELECT "c"."Name" AS "指挥家姓名", COUNT("s"."Show_ID") AS "演出数量"
FROM "conductor" "c"
LEFT JOIN "orchestra" "o" ON "c"."Conductor_ID" = "o"."Conductor_ID"
LEFT JOIN "performance" "p" ON "o"."Orchestra_ID" = "p"."Orchestra_ID"
LEFT JOIN "show" "s" ON "p"."Performance_ID" = "s"."Performance_ID"
GROUP BY "c"."Conductor_ID"
ORDER BY "演出数量" DESC

question: 查询每个国家的官方语言有哪些，按国家名排序
generated_sql:
SELECT "country"."Name" AS "国家", "countrylanguage"."Language" AS "官方语言"
FROM "country"
JOIN "countrylanguage" ON "country"."Code" = "countrylanguage"."CountryCode"
WHERE "countrylanguage"."IsOfficial" = 'T'
ORDER BY "country"."Name"

question: 查询每位员工在评估中获得的最高分数
generated_sql:
SELECT e."Name", MAX(ev."Bonus") AS "最高分数"
FROM "employee" e
JOIN "evaluation" ev ON CAST(e."Employee_ID" AS TEXT) = ev."Employee_ID"
GROUP BY e."Employee_ID", e."Name"
ORDER BY MAX(ev."Bonus") DESC

question: 找出生产车型数量最多的制造商名称及其生产的车型数量
generated_sql: SELECT cm."FullName" AS "制造商名称", COUNT(DISTINCT ml."Model") AS "车型数量" FROM "car_makers" cm JOIN "model_list" ml ON cm."Id" = ml."Maker" GROUP BY cm."Id" ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT ml."Model") DESC LIMIT 1

question: 查询官方语言数量超过3种的国家名称
generated_sql:
SELECT "c"."Name"
FROM "country" "c"
JOIN "countrylanguage" "cl" ON "c"."Code" = "cl"."CountryCode"
WHERE "cl"."IsOfficial" = 'T'
GROUP BY "c"."Code", "c"."Name"
HAVING COUNT(*) > 3

question: 找出航班数量最多的前3个机场城市
generated_sql:
SELECT "a"."City", COUNT(*) AS "FlightCount"
FROM "flights" "f"
JOIN "airports" "a" ON "f"."SourceAirport" = "a"."AirportCode"
GROUP BY "a"."City"
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 3

question: 查询包含段落数最多的前5份文档的标题及其段落数
generated_sql:
SELECT "d"."Document_Name" AS "标题", COUNT("p"."Paragraph_ID") AS "段落数"
FROM "Documents" "d"
JOIN "Paragraphs" "p" ON "d"."Document_ID" = "p"."Document_ID"
GROUP BY "d"."Document_ID"
ORDER BY "段落数" DESC
LIMIT 5

question: 查询选修了课程数量最多的学生姓名及其选修课程数
generated_sql:
SELECT "Students"."first_name" || ' ' || "Students"."last_name" AS "学生姓名", COUNT("Student_Enrolment_Courses"."student_course_id") AS "选修课程数"
FROM "Students"
JOIN "Student_Enrolment" ON "Students"."student_id" = "Student_Enrolment"."student_id"
JOIN "Student_Enrolment_Courses" ON "Student_Enrolment"."student_enrolment_id" = "Student_Enrolment_Courses"."student_enrolment_id"
GROUP BY "Students"."student_id"
ORDER BY "选修课程数" DESC
LIMIT 1
